ascension.title: Weary Traveler
ascension.description: Ancients only heal 80% of your missing HP.

ascension.title: Poverty
ascension.description: Enemies and Treasure Chests drop 25% less Gold.

ascension.title: Tight Belt
ascension.description: Start each run with 1 less potion slot.

ascension.title: Scarcity
ascension.description: Rare and Upgraded cards appear less often.

ascension.title: Tough Enemies
ascension.description: All enemies are harder to kill.

ascension.title: Double Boss
ascension.description: Fight two bosses at the end of Act 3.

map_rooms.title: Enemy
map_rooms.description: Hostile enemies reside in these rooms.

map_rooms.title: Elite
map_rooms.description:
Powerful foes are in these rooms.

Defeating them will reward you a Relic.

map_rooms.title: Boss
map_rooms.description:
The deadliest foe in the area.

Defeating them will let you proceed to the next Act.

map_rooms.title: Event
map_rooms.description: Something unusual occurs in these rooms...

map_rooms.title: Shop
map_rooms.description:
The mysterious Merchant sells his wares in these rooms.

Spend your well-earned Gold here!

map_rooms.title: Rest Site
map_rooms.description: Stop by these rooms to Heal some HP or Upgrade a card.

map_rooms.title: Treasure Room
map_rooms.description: Relics and Gold can be found in these coveted rooms.

map_rooms.title: Ancient
map_rooms.description:
Ancients reside in these rooms.

They grant incredible bonuses, treasures, and knowledge.

core_concepts.title: Energy
core_concepts.description: Energy is used to play cards from your Hand.

core_concepts.title: Hit Points (HP)
core_concepts.description: If you run out of HP, you die.

core_concepts.title: Gold
core_concepts.description: How much Gold you have. Gold is the currency within the Spire.

core_concepts.title: Draw Pile (A)
core_concepts.description:
At the start of each turn,
5 cards are drawn from here.

Click to view the cards in your draw pile (shuffled).

core_concepts.title: Discard Pile (S)
core_concepts.description:
If your draw pile is empty, the discard pile is shuffled into the draw pile.

Click to view the cards in your discard pile.

core_concepts.title: Exhausted Cards (X)
core_concepts.description: Click to view cards Exhausted this combat.

orbs.title: Lightning
orbs.description:
Passive: At the end of turn, deal {Passive} damage to a random enemy.
Evoke: Deal {Evoke} damage to a random enemy.
orbs.passive: At the end of turn, deal {Passive} damage to a random enemy.
orbs.evoke: Deal {Evoke} damage to a random enemy.

orbs.title: Frost
orbs.description:
Passive: At the end of turn, gain {Passive} Block.
Evoke: Gain {Evoke} Block.
orbs.passive: At the end of turn, gain {Passive} Block.

orbs.title: Dark
orbs.description:
Passive: At the end of turn, increase this Orb's damage by {Passive}.
Evoke: Deal {Evoke} damage to the enemy with the lowest HP.
orbs.passive: At the end of turn, increase this Orb's damage by {Passive}.
orbs.evoke: Deal {Evoke} damage to the enemy with the lowest HP.

orbs.title: Plasma
orbs.description:
Passive: At the start of turn,
gain 1 Energy.
Evoke: Gain 2 Energy.
Plasma is unaffected by Focus.
orbs.passive:
At the start of turn,
gain 1 Energy.
orbs.evoke:
Gain 2 Energy.
Plasma is unaffected by Focus.

orbs.title: Glass
orbs.description:
Passive: At the end of turn, deal {Passive} damage to ALL enemies and reduce this orb's value by 1.
Evoke: Deal {Evoke} damage to ALL enemies.
orbs.passive: At the end of turn, deal {Passive} damage to ALL enemies and reduce this orb's value by 1.

character_mechanics.title: Stars
character_mechanics.description: Your current Star (★) count. The Regent's cards may require ★ to play.

character_mechanics.title: Summon
character_mechanics.description:
Summon Osty.
If already summoned, raise his Max HP for this combat.

character_mechanics.title: Forge
character_mechanics.description: The first time you Forge each combat, add Sovereign Blade into your Hand. Adds additional damage to Sovereign Blade.

character_mechanics.title: Replay
character_mechanics.description: Plays this card an additional time.

character_mechanics.title: Fatal
character_mechanics.description: Triggers whenever this card kills a non-minion enemy.

keywords.description: Cannot be removed or transformed from your Deck.
If this card is in your Hand at the end of this turn, it is Exhausted.
Removed until the end of combat.
Start each combat with this card in your Hand.
Retained cards are not discarded at the end of turn.
If this card is discarded from your Hand before the end of your turn, play it for free.
